note: All datasets are real, fetched from the sources below or documented well-known catalog values. Fallbacks are explicitly marked.

datasets.name: Stars (HYG v4.0, Gaia-derived)
datasets.filter: dist <= 500 pc AND mag <= 9, OR mag <= 6.5 (naked eye) at any distance
datasets.license: HYG database: public domain / CC-BY-SA 4.0 per repo README

datasets.name: Exoplanets (confirmed, default parameter set)
datasets.source: NASA Exoplanet Archive â€” Planetary Systems (ps) table
datasets.license: NASA Exoplanet Archive: public data, cite archive

datasets.name: Deep-sky objects
datasets.distances: Curated published distances for well-known objects; others null

datasets.name: Milky Way backdrop: ESA/Gaia DR2 all-sky, equirectangular 2000x1000 (ESA/Gaia/DPAC, CC BY-SA 3.0 IGO)
Solar system body textures (2k)
datasets.license: Solar System Scope â€” CC BY 4.0 (https://www.solarsystemscope.com/textures/)
datasets.note: 2k_earth_normal_map.tif converted in-repo to 2k_earth_normal_map.png (browsers cannot decode TIF); original kept on disk.

datasets.name: Cepheids (Skowron+2019 disk map)
datasets.license: Skowron et al. 2019, Science 365, 478 — cite the paper

datasets.name: Globular clusters (Harris + LVDB)
datasets.license: LVDB: CC0 / cite Pace+2022; Harris 1996 (2010 ed.)

datasets.name: Local Group / Local Volume galaxies (LVDB + M31/M33)
Proper-named stars (HYG v4.1, ≤1400 pc)
datasets.license: HYG database: public domain / CC-BY-SA 4.0 per repo README

datasets.name: Constellation figures (Stellarium modern skyculture + HYG)
datasets.license: Stellarium sky cultures: GPL-compatible / CC BY-SA; line work © Stellarium contributors

datasets.name: Landmarks (local clouds / Milky Way / Local Group)
3D dust volume (Leike/Lallement Gaia maps)
datasets.source: Leike & Ensslin / Lallement 3D dust maps (via sb2580/k3d_dust k3d snapshot)
datasets.note: uint8 log-encoded density cube kept in galactic Cartesian; mounted under a rotated group in-app
datasets.license: Leike & Ensslin 2020 / Lallement et al. dust maps — cite the underlying papers

datasets.name: CMB all-sky map (WMAP 9-year ILC)
datasets.source: NASA/WMAP Science Team via Wikimedia Commons (File:WMAP 2012.png)
datasets.note: Mollweide 4096x2048 reprojected to 2048x1024 equirectangular offline (scripts/fetch_cmb.py); magic bytes verified; mounted on a 46.5 Gly shell. sci.esa.int Planck equirectangular JPEG returned 404 (removed from scicms), so WMAP 9yr is the reachable real map.
datasets.license: NASA public domain (NASA imagery policy), credit NASA/WMAP Science Team

datasets.name: 2MRS galaxy redshift catalog (Huchra+ 2012)
datasets.source: CDS VizieR J/ApJS/199/26 table3 via asu-tsv endpoint
datasets.note: galaxies with cz in (35, 21000) km/s -> 0.5-300 Mpc at H0=70; peculiar velocities make individual cz distances approximate inside ~30 Mpc; blueshifted/nearby galaxies (M31 etc.) are covered by the LVDB Local Group layer instead. tdc-www.cfa.harvard.edu 2mrs mirror 404s; cdsarc direct FTP is bot-gated, so the VizieR TSV endpoint was used.
datasets.license: CDS VizieR data usage policy; cite Huchra+ 2012, ApJS 199, 26 (doi:10.26093/cds/vizier.21990026)
